SLAYTHESTATS-COLOR_BLIND_MODE.title: Color Blind Mode
SLAYTHESTATS-COLOR_BLIND_MODE.hover.desc: Use a color-blind-friendly palette instead of red/green for stat coloring.
SLAYTHESTATS-SIGNIFICANCE_COLORING.title: Stat Significance Colors
SLAYTHESTATS-SIGNIFICANCE_COLORING.hover: Shade stats green/red by how far they sit from the baseline. Turn off to show all stats in a neutral shade (bold emphasis is kept).
SLAYTHESTATS-SHOW_IN_RUN_STATS.title: Show In-Run Stats
SLAYTHESTATS-SHOW_IN_RUN_STATS.hover.des: Show stat tooltips during a run (card rewards, shop, relic hovers). When off, stats only appear in the compendium.
SLAYTHESTATS-DISABLE_TOOLTIPS_ENTIRELY.h: Master switch — turns off all stat tooltips everywhere in the game.
SLAYTHESTATS-TUTORIAL_SEEN.title: Tutorial Seen
SLAYTHESTATS-TUTORIAL_SEEN.hover.desc: Whether the first-run welcome tutorial has been dismissed. Toggle off to see it again next time you open the Card Library or Relic Collection compendium page.
SLAYTHESTATS-BESTIARY_TUTORIAL_SEEN.hove: Whether the bestiary tutorial overlay has been dismissed. Toggle off to see it again on next bestiary open.
SLAYTHESTATS-ENCOUNTER_STATS_RESTART_REQ: Controls which encounter-stats surfaces are enabled. BestiaryAndTooltips: Stats Bestiary button in compendium + in-combat hover tooltip. Tooltips: tooltip only, bestiary button hidden. Disabled: both off. Requires a game restart to take effect.
SLAYTHESTATS-BESTIARY_PREVIEW_MODE.title: Bestiary Preview Mode
SLAYTHESTATS-BESTIARY_PREVIEW_MODE.hover: Live: animated monster preview in the bestiary page (higher GPU cost). None: no preview rendering at all.
SLAYTHESTATS-DATA_DIRECTORY.title: Data Directory
SLAYTHESTATS-DATA_DIRECTORY.hover.desc: Override the root SlayTheSpire2 data directory (the folder containing the 'steam' subfolder). Leave empty to use the platform default. Example: /home/deck/.local/share/SlayTheSpire2
SLAYTHESTATS-DEBUG_MODE.title: Debug Mode
SLAYTHESTATS-DEBUG_MODE.hover.desc: Surface internal state in tooltips (context key, raw counters, build version) to help diagnose issues without reading logs.
SLAYTHESTATS-COMMUNITY_STATS.title: Community Stats (Spire Codex)
SLAYTHESTATS-COMMUNITY.title: Community Stats
SLAYTHESTATS-COMMUNITY.hover.title: Community Stats (Spire Codex)
SLAYTHESTATS-COMMUNITY.hover.desc:
Show how the wider community fares with each card and relic, pulled from spire-codex.com and shown as a reference line next to your own stats.

Off — hidden; no network connection is ever made.
Enable without sharing — downloads community stats to display; your own runs are never uploaded.
Enable & share runs — also contributes your completed runs to the public community dataset.

Either enabled option connects to spire-codex.com.
Which slice of the community the reference line represents. Everyone covers all recorded runs; Ascension 10+ restricts it to high-ascension play.
SLAYTHESTATS-COMMUNITY_REFRESH_NOW.title: Refresh community data
SLAYTHESTATS-COMMUNITY_RESET_STATE.title: Reset Spire Codex state (dev)
community.consent.title: Community Stats
community.consent.body:
SlayTheStats can show how the wider community fares with each card and relic — a reference line next to your own stats, pulled from spire-codex.com.

Sharing your completed runs helps keep everyone's stats accurate. Either option connects to spire-codex.com; you can change this anytime in Settings.
community.consent.decide_later: (Esc or click outside to decide later)
tooltip.baseline.event.shape2_no_data: Offered data not recorded for this event
tooltip.baseline.label: (baseline)
tooltip.community.label: (community)
filter.pane.title: SlayTheStats Filters
filter.community.cohort_a10: Only show community stats for A10+
filter.community.cohort_disabled_hint: Enable Spire Codex in the mod configuration to show community stats.
welcome.title: Welcome to SlayTheStats!
welcome.body:
Click the SlayTheStats button to adjust the filters
for specific ascensions, versions, profiles, and more.

Save default settings to customize stats shown in-run.
bestiary.sort.label: Sort by:
bestiary.sort.name: Name
bestiary.table_type.label: Table Type
bestiary.rank.label: Rank by:
bestiary.rank.title: Ranking modes
bestiary.rank.body:
[b][color=#efc851]Raw[/color][/b] — sort by raw metric, ignoring sample size.

[b][color=#efc851]Significance[/color][/b] — sort by significance calculation, taking into account number of fights & deviation. An encounter with +10 damage at n=30 ranks more significant than an encounter with +30 damage at n=5.

[color=#bfb7a6]Click anywhere to dismiss.[/color]
bestiary.legend.table_type.title: Table type
bestiary.legend.table_type.body:
{prismatic_icon} — compare all characters for this encounter. Damage represents percentage of starting max HP.
{char_icons} etc — see how this encounter compares to others for this character. Damage represents raw damage taken.
bestiary.legend.stat_columns.title: Stat columns
bestiary.legend.stat_columns.body:
[b][color=#efc851]Fights[/color][/b] — how many times you fought this encounter.
[b][color=#efc851]Dist[/color][/b] — damage distribution. Leftmost is number of fights at the least damage, rightmost is the number of fights at the highest damage.
[b][color=#efc851]Dmg[/color][/b] — median damage taken.
[b][color=#efc851]Mid 50%[/color][/b] — the range that typical fight damage lands in. A quarter of your fights took less than the lower number, half landed inside the range, and a quarter took more than the higher number.
[b][color=#efc851]Spread[/color][/b] — the Mid 50% range as a fraction of the median. Higher spread means damage taken is less consistent. A spread of 100% means the Mid 50% range is as wide as the median damage. Spread is similar to variance but easier to compare across distributions.
[b][color=#efc851]Turns[/color][/b] — average turns.
[b][color=#efc851]Pots[/color][/b] — average potions.
[b][color=#efc851]Deaths[/color][/b] — runs ended by this encounter / total fights.
bestiary.legend.dist.title: Distribution
bestiary.legend.dist.body: The [b][color=#efc851]Dist[/color][/b] column visualizes the distribution of damage taken over all fights. A higher point on the curve represents more fights at that damage. Below the curve is a shaded region representing the Mid 50% of fights, and the line within that region is the median.
compendium.legend.columns.title: Stat meanings
compendium.legend.combat.title: Post-fight summary
compendium.legend.columns.body:
[b][color=#efc851]Act[/color][/b] — the act that the card/relic was offered.
[b][color=#efc851]Runs[/color][/b] — the number of runs you obtained it over the number of runs it was offered. Relics don't have a times-offered count.
[b][color=#efc851]Pick%[/color][/b] — how often you picked the card when it was offered as a card reward.
[b][color=#efc851]Buys[/color][/b] — how often you bought the card/relic when available in the shop. Note that this doesn't take affordability into account.
[b][color=#efc851]Win%[/color][/b] — how often you win runs with the card/relic.
The [b][color=#efc851](baseline)[/color][/b] row is the overall pick/win/buy rate across all runs that match the current filters.
compendium.legend.combat.body:
[b][color=#efc851]Damage[/color][/b] — HP you lost this fight.
[b][color=#efc851]Turns[/color][/b] — turns this fight took.
[b][color=#efc851]Pots[/color][/b] — potions you used this fight.
[b][color=#efc851]vs hist.[/color][/b] — how this fight compares to your past fights for this encounter (lower is better).
[b][color=#efc851]pctile[/color][/b] — where this fight ranks among those past fights.
[b][color=#efc851]Dist[/color][/b] — the spread of your past fights, with a caret marking this one.
bestiary.help.rank_tooltip: What do Raw and Significance mean?
bestiary.settings.title: Bestiary Settings
bestiary.placeholder.hover_encounter: Hover an encounter to see stats
bestiary.tutorial.intro.title: Welcome to SlayTheStats Bestiary!
bestiary.tutorial.intro.body: Here you can see stats for all the encounters in the game. You can disable the Bestiary in the Mod Configuration settings.
bestiary.tutorial.filters.title: Biome filters
bestiary.tutorial.filters.body: Change biome/act and sorting here. Click an encounter below to see its stats, or click a category to see the whole pool's stats, such as [b][color=#e84ad5]Elite[/color][/b].
bestiary.tutorial.characters.title: Stats tables
bestiary.tutorial.characters.body: Select character here or select {prismatic_icon} to see a table comparing all characters.
bestiary.tutorial.characters.help_suffix: for details on what the columns mean.
bestiary.tutorial.filter_pane.title: Run filters
bestiary.tutorial.filter_pane.body: Click here to filter by ascension, version, etc. Save defaults to affect in-run encounter stats.
bestiary.tutorial.filter_pane.help_suffi: at the top of the page to replay this tutorial.
